nodes.label: AC-004: Verify changed module can be imported without ImportError
Test that workOrderStore module can be imported
Test that workorder types can be imported
Test that dashboardStore module can be imported
AC-001: Test work order state machine transitions
Test that new work order starts in DRAFT state
Test DRAFT -> PENDING transition on SUBMIT event
Test PENDING -> APPROVED transition on APPROVE event
Test PENDING -> REJECTED transition on REJECT event
Test REJECTED -> CLOSED transition on CLOSE event
Test APPROVED -> CLOSED transition on CLOSE event
Test that CLOSED state blocks all transitions
AC-001: Integration tests for approval workflow frontend components
Mock API response for work order operations
Test approving work order changes state to APPROVED
Test rejecting work order changes state to REJECTED
Test submitting work order changes state to PENDING
Test approver info contains required fields
AC-001: Test Approve/Reject operation buttons functionality
Test APPROVE action is available for PENDING state
Test REJECT action is available for PENDING state
Test APPROVE action is NOT available for DRAFT state
Test APPROVE action is NOT available for terminal states
Test REJECT action is NOT available for terminal states
AC-001: Test approval comment input functionality
Test approval with comment is saved
Test rejection with comment is saved
Test approval does not require comment
Test computed getters in work order store
Test draftWorkOrders computed property filters correctly
Test pendingWorkOrders computed property filters correctly
Test closedWorkOrders computed property filters correctly
AC-004: Test dashboard store module import
Test dashboard store can be imported
Test dashboard types can be imported
Test dashboard store exports required interfaces
Test chart type can be toggled between pie and bar
AC-004: Test migration module can be imported
Test migration module can be imported
AC-001: Complete integration test for work order approval workflow
Test complete workflow: create -> submit -> approve -> close
Test complete workflow: create -> submit -> reject -> close
Test notification is triggered when work order is submitted
Test notification is triggered when work order is approved
Test notification is triggered when work order is rejected
Test error handling in work order operations
Test fetchWorkOrders handles API errors gracefully
Test createWorkOrder handles API errors gracefully
Test invalid state transition raises appropriate error
Test concurrent modification is handled with version field
Test validation rules from acceptance criteria
Test ticket type must be valid
Test work order ID format is valid UUID
Test approver cannot approve own ticket
